message:
🐛 Fix operators page infinite skeleton loading (#967)

Backend:
- Add 15s per-cluster timeout to single-cluster and fallback paths
  in ListOperators handler (prevents hanging when cluster is unreachable)
- Use make([]Operator, 0) instead of nil slice so JSON serializes as
  [] instead of null

Frontend (operators.ts):
- Replace cancelled flag with AbortController for proper request
  cancellation
- Add fetchInProgressRef guard to prevent overlapping fetches from
  30s auto-refresh
- Reduce API timeout from 90s to 15s so UI doesn't hang
- Always exit loading state (setIsLoading(false)) even on errors
- Track hasCompletedFetchRef to avoid premature empty state on
  transient failures

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
